resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def minEnd(self, n: int, x: int) -> int:
        i = 0
        while (x >> i) & 1 == 0:
            i += 1
        return (x + (1 << i) - 1) // (1 << (i + 1 - n + 1)) * (1 << (i + 1 - n + 1)) - 1
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log x)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses bitwise operations to find the minimum possible value of the last element in the array. It first finds the position of the rightmost set bit in the binary representation of x, then calculates the minimum possible value of the last element based on this position and the given constraints.
